% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for susan_lga_neg
% SZS output start Proof for susan_lga_neg
1. flies_to(susan,lga) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0,X1,X2] : ((flies_from(X0,X1) & flies_to(X0,X2)) => X1 != X2) [input(axiom)]
4. ~flies_from(susan,lga) [input(conjecture)]
5. ~~flies_from(susan,lga) [negated conjecture 4]
6. flies_from(susan,lga) [flattening 5]
7. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (X1 != X2 | (~flies_from(X0,X1) | ~flies_to(X0,X2))) [ennf transformation 2]
8. ! [X0,X1,X2] : (X1 != X2 | ~flies_from(X0,X1) | ~flies_to(X0,X2)) [flattening 7]
9. flies_to(susan,lga) [cnf transformation 1]
10. X1 != X2 | ~flies_from(X0,X1) | ~flies_to(X0,X2) [cnf transformation 8]
12. flies_from(susan,lga) [cnf transformation 6]
13. ~flies_from(X0,X2) | ~flies_to(X0,X2) [equality resolution 10]
14. ~flies_to(susan,lga) [resolution 13,12]
16. $false [forward subsumption resolution 14,9]
% SZS output end Proof for susan_lga_neg
% Termination reason: Refutation
